LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF CECILIA RAYGOZA IS GRANTED. CLAIMANT CECILIA RAYGOZA' MONTHLY EXPENSES EXCEEDS HER MONTHLY INCOME AND ALL OF HER INCOME IS NECESSARY FOR THE SUPPORT OF HERSELF AND DEPENDENT CHILDREN. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY HELD FUNDS TO CLAIMANT. (THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE ORDER. COPIES OF THE ORDER WILL BE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976. (302)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cecilia Raygoza, Defendant/Judgment Debtor/Claimant, appearing on her own behalf;
Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. of Your Community Lawyer, Tel. 510.985.9250, appearing specially for the plaintiff.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel did not give proper notice that she will appear to contest the tentative ruling. The Court did not hear argument and adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. The Claim of Exemption of Cecilia Raygoza is granted. Claimant Cecilia Raygoza' monthly expenses exceeds her monthly income and all of her income is necessary for the support of herself and dependent children. The Sheriff is directed to release any held funds to Claimant. (The Court will prepare the order. Copies of the order will be mailed to all parties.) Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
